item.title: Contact Me
item.description: 🔗 Github: duncan-f 🔗 Twitter: @duncan12back ✉️ E-mail: fmokhtari@mail.ru You can buy me coffee ☕ here: Bitcoin <<<<<<< HEAD 1JJmuidSTRCugnBKH8H7bDxEmTtAAg4kyn ======= 1JJmuidSTRCugnBKH8H7bDxEmTtAAg4kyn >>>>>>> 4a157b6 (Added some styling to the crypto) USDT <<<<<<< HEAD TWi6yNRhxzkmgZhhoriDzWgvrSsxbdQCb8 ======= TWi6yNRhxzkmgZhhoriDzWgvrSsxbdQCb8 >>>>>>> 4a157b6 (Added some styling to the crypto) Monero <<<<<<< HEAD ======= >>>>>>> 4a157b6 (Added some styling to the crypto) 87Asjp2TLCkKnw3PYsiKaTDwL8mNhiL7uV67ptCtVxqbSnaZfATQ6t4d1mfWnKu4kB4ieQHMApGhUdUY3h4RKBS2Kuc5RyW
